channel.title: NEONCPS | Free CPS Test and Guide Updates
channel.description: Updates for NEONCPS free CPS test and guide on desktop and mobile, including score interpretation, methodology notes, and test improvements.

item.title: NEONCPS | Free CPS Test and Guide (1s, 5s, 10s, 60s)
item.description: Free CPS test and guide for desktop and mobile with score interpretation, methodology notes, repeatability tips, and safety guidance.
